title: Generate R program to derive ADLBC (Lab (shift analysis))

inputs.prompt: Write an R program using the admiral package to create the ADLBC (Lab (shift analysis)) analysis dataset. The program must: (1) Read relevant SDTM source datasets and merge with ADSL, (2) Derive key variables: SHIFT, ANRIND, BNRIND, AVAL, BASE, PARAMCD, (3) Handle shift from baseline to post-baseline reference range category, shift table derivation, (4) Apply ADaM variable attributes and metadata per specification, (5) Output xpt dataset with proper labels. The dataset contains approximately 7778 records.
